rules.message: The BOM row has no reference designator.
rules.recommendation: Add schematic references such as R1, C1, Q1, or T1.

rules.message: The part field looks like a generic placeholder.
rules.recommendation: Replace placeholders with a real value, rating, package, or manufacturer part number.

rules.message: High-voltage related parts must show a voltage rating.
rules.recommendation: Add rated voltage, insulation rating, creepage requirement, or an exact manufacturer part number.

rules.message: Power or high-voltage resistor rows should include wattage.
rules.recommendation: Add continuous power, pulse power if relevant, and derating assumptions.

rules.message: Transformer rows need a controlled custom specification.
rules.recommendation: Add core type, material, turns ratio, insulation target, frequency range, and vendor drawing reference.
